rationale: Gov't Code §2001.035 governs procedural compliance for agency rulemaking. The proposed change is a statutory amendment to Tax Code §11.13(b), not an agency rule adoption, so no conflict arises.
quote: A rule is voidable unless a state agency adopts it in substantial compliance with Sections 2001.022 through 2001.034.
_note: Rule text concerns agency rulemaking procedure; proposed change is legislative statutory amendment. No direct conflict.
